name: pi-agent-booster-pack
description: Agent Booster Pack helps Pi produce code that is well-organized, low in complexity and side effects, and is secure and high-performing.

scripts.install-ext: npm run build && mkdir -p ~/.pi/agent/extensions && ln -sfn "$(pwd)" ~/.pi/agent/extensions/pi-agent-booster-pack && echo 'Installed to ~/.pi/agent/extensions/pi-agent-booster-pack -- run /reload in Pi to activate'

author: Alastair Dawson
